productsPage.title: Industrial Lubricants
productsPage.metaDescription: The full Phúc Thọ catalog of industrial lubricants: hydraulic oils, engine oils, gear oils, and greases from Shell, Mobil, Total, and Castrol.
productsPage.description: High-quality industrial lubricants for every industry. 100% genuine Shell, Mobil, Total, and Castrol products — strictly inspected and stored.
productsPage.noResults: No matching products found. Please try a different keyword or filter.

brands.shell: A world-leading lubricant brand with the Tellus, Rimula, Omala, and Gadus lines — comprehensive lubrication solutions for industry and transportation.
brands.mobil: Advanced lubrication technology from ExxonMobil: Mobil DTE, Delvac, SHC, Mobilgrease — outstanding performance for heavy industrial equipment.
brands.total: TotalEnergies lubricants from France: Rubia, Azolla, Carter — European quality at a competitive price for every industry.
brands.castrol: A British lubricant brand with over 120 years of heritage: Hyspin, Alpha, Vecton, Magnatec — optimal protection for industrial engines and machinery.

industriesPage.metaDescription: Phúc Thọ supplies high-quality industrial lubricants across many industries: oil & gas, maritime, manufacturing, transportation, and construction.
industriesPage.description: We supply high-quality industrial lubricants across a wide range of industries, from automotive to heavy industry.

services.metaDescription: Comprehensive lubrication solutions with professional service, from technical consulting to dedicated after-sales support.
services.title: Our Services
services.intro: Comprehensive lubrication solutions with professional service, from technical consulting to dedicated after-sales support.

coreServices.title: Lubricant Product Consulting
coreServices.description: Our team of experts analyzes your operating requirements, machinery types, and working environment to recommend the optimal lubricant products, ensuring high performance and extended equipment life. We advise on engine oils, hydraulic oils, industrial oils, and greases.
coreServices.benefits: Optimized equipment performance, extended machinery life, reduced maintenance costs, and compliance with industry standards.

coreServices.title: In-Depth Technical Support
coreServices.description: We provide comprehensive technical support, including answering questions about product properties, proper usage guidance, lubrication-related issue analysis, and remediation solutions. Our experienced engineers are ready to help by phone, email, or on-site.
coreServices.benefits: Fast problem resolution, improved lubrication knowledge, optimized operating processes, and reduced downtime.

coreServices.title: Bulk Order Service
coreServices.description: For businesses with regular, high-volume lubricant needs, we offer bulk ordering with competitive pricing, attractive discounts, and flexible delivery options. We ensure a stable supply and consistent product quality.
coreServices.benefits: Lower purchasing costs, stable supply assurance, a simple ordering process, and door-to-door delivery support.

coreServices.title: Comprehensive Maintenance Solutions
coreServices.description: We offer comprehensive maintenance solutions including periodic oil sample analysis, machinery condition checks, oil-change and lubrication scheduling, and preventive-measure consulting. Our goal is to help customers maintain optimal equipment performance, minimize breakdown risk, and extend asset life.
coreServices.benefits: Fewer breakdowns, extended equipment life, optimized maintenance costs, and improved operational safety.

coreServices.title: Product Quality Assurance
coreServices.description: Quality is our top priority. Every lubricant product undergoes strict quality control from raw materials to the final product. We provide quality certifications, test reports, and ensure products meet or exceed international and local industry standards.
coreServices.benefits: Peace of mind on product quality, standards compliance, reduced operational risk, and enhanced brand reputation.

additionalServices.title: In-Depth Technical Consulting
additionalServices.description: An experienced technical team ready to advise on optimal lubrication solutions for each industry and specific application.

additionalServices.title: Fast Delivery
additionalServices.description: A wide distribution network ensuring fast, door-to-door delivery across the region and nearby provinces.

additionalServices.title: Dedicated After-Sales Support
additionalServices.description: 24/7 customer care, ready to answer any questions and provide technical support when needed.

additionalServices.title: Lubricant Analysis
additionalServices.description: Periodic lubricant sample analysis service to track machinery condition and predict maintenance needs.

services.processSubtitle: We work through a professional, transparent process

processSteps.title: Consultation & Survey
processSteps.description: Understanding your needs and surveying your equipment's current condition

processSteps.title: Solution Proposal
processSteps.description: Recommending the optimal lubrication solution for each application

processSteps.description: Technical support and periodic performance follow-up

services.commitmentSectionText: We believe our customers' success is Phúc Thọ's success. Let us partner with you on your journey toward sustainable, efficient operations.
commitmentItems: 100% genuine lubricants — meeting international ISO standards
In-depth technical consulting for every industrial application
Periodic oil analysis — timely maintenance forecasting
Fast delivery — serving the entire region and beyond
24/7 technical support — answering all product and application questions

equivalentFinder.metaDescription: Find equivalent lubricant products across Shell, Mobil, Total, and Castrol by category and viscosity grade.
equivalentFinder.title: Equivalent Product Finder
equivalentFinder.intro: Currently using one brand's lubricant but want to compare equivalent products from Shell, Mobil, Total, or Castrol? Select a product below to see suggestions in the same category and viscosity grade.
equivalentFinder.selectLabel: Select the product you currently use
equivalentFinder.noViscosity: This product doesn't have viscosity grade information for automatic comparison yet. Please contact our technical team for advice on equivalent products.
equivalentFinder.noEquivalents: No equivalent products from other brands found in this category (viscosity grade {grade}).
equivalentFinder.suggestionCount: {count} equivalent product suggestions — same category {category}, viscosity grade {grade}
equivalentFinder.disclaimer: * Suggested results are based on matching product category and similar viscosity grade, for initial reference only — not an official replacement confirmation. Please contact the Phúc Thọ technical team for advice and confirmation before changing the product you currently use.
